name: CancelContract
description: Customer wants to cancel their Virgin Media contract, leave the company, or is responding to an annual best tariff notification (ABTN) with intent to leave. This is a full account cancellation, not a partial package reduction, and not a request to reverse an existing cancellation.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to cancel my contract
How do I cancel my Virgin Media account?
Cancel my broadband please
I want to leave Virgin Media
I need to cancel because {cancellationReason}
I'm {cancellationReason} so I need to cancel my services
Please cancel my account — {cancellationReason}
I've decided to cancel — {cancellationReason}
I want to give notice to cancel my contract
How much notice do I need to give to cancel?
What happens when I cancel my account?
I want to arrange my disconnection
Can you tell me the process for cancelling?
I don't want to continue with my Virgin Media services
I'd like to terminate my contract
I got an ABTN letter and I want to cancel
I received my annual best tariff notification and I'm not happy — I want to leave
{cancellationReason} and I want to cancel my account
My contract ends next month and I don't want to continue
I'm not renewing — please cancel my services
yeah I just want to cancel everything
Can I cancel my contract early?
What are the cancellation fees if I leave now?
I want to close my account with you
cancel my contract
